cards.front: What is the primary function of the Datagram Protocol (UDP)
cards.back: Connectionless, best-effort delivery, fast transmission, no error checking or correction

cards.front: What is the primary function of the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP)
cards.back: Connection-oriented, reliable delivery, error checking and correction, flow control

cards.front: What is a segment in the context of TCP?
cards.back: The basic unit of data transmitted over a TCP connection, includes header and payload

cards.front: What is the purpose of flow control in TCP?
cards.back: To prevent network congestion by limiting the amount of data transmitted at one time

cards.front: What is the purpose of error control in TCP?
cards.back: To detect and correct errors in data transmission, ensuring reliable delivery of data
